case_title: KIM, SUK vs. HOFF, BRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, SUK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOFF, BRENDA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE WAS NOT ESTABLISHED. CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT APPEARS TO BE EXCESSIVE. NO EXPERT TESTIMONY BY DEFENSE.
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOFF, BRENDA
